title: micromeria hyssopifolia var. hirta
intro: Micromeria hyssopifolia var. hirta, also known as a variety of mountain savory, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Micromeria hyssopifolia var. hirta include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its antimicrobial properties which may help to prevent infections. This plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts.
